base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of kanto_overworld_maps — a tile (overworld_map) from 1996 pokemon red blue. Kanto overworld + 20 routes + 8 cities (Pallet/Viridian/Pewter/Cerulean/Vermilion/Celadon/Fuchsia/Saffron/Cinnabar/Indigo Plateau). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
